user.title: Sifely Smart Lock
user.description:
Enter your Sifely API credentials.

**Client ID** and **Client Secret** come from the [Sifely API Access portal](https://app-smart-manager.sifely.com/Login.html) (the values shown after you register an app).

**Username** and **Password** are your personal Sifely *account* login — the same ones you use in the Sifely mobile app.

data_description.username: The email or phone number you use to log in to the Sifely app
data_description.password: Your Sifely app password (never shared — stored securely in HA)

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check that your Client ID matches exactly what the Sifely portal shows, and that your username/password are correct.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Sifely API. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred — check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Sifely account is already configured.
